subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Us unto him who hastened to the Most Exalted Station, which hath been honored by the advent of the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سرع الی المقام الاعلی الذی تشرف بقدوم مالک الاسماء و انا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
